name: EventHandler - MoraleOverMaxEffect
description: Verify MoraleOverMaxEffect EventHandler loads and can be read

steps.name: Find skill with MoraleOverMaxEffect
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("MoraleOverMaxEffect"); }); skill != null ? skill.ToString() : null

steps.name: Load EventHandlers array
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("MoraleOverMaxEffect"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers != null

steps.name: Verify _type field
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("MoraleOverMaxEffect"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers.ToString().Contains("MoraleOverMaxEffect") ? true : false

steps.name: Read Effect parameter
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("MoraleOverMaxEffect"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers.ToString().Contains("Effect")
